log.logFullAuth - Log full authentication of tags
core.server.http_port - HTTP port for the webinterface
core.server.https_web_port - HTTPS port for the webinterface
core.server.https_api_port - HTTPS port for the Toniebox API
core.server.bind_ip - ip for binding the http ports to
core.certdir - Directory to upload genuine client certificates
core.librarydir - Directory of the audio library
core.datadir - Base directory for 'contentdir', 'firmwaredir', 'cachedir' and 'wwwdir' when they are relative
core.cachedir - Directory where to cache files downloaded from internet
core.new_webgui_as_default - Use new WebGUI as default
core.boxCertAuth - Client certificates are required for access to the HTTPS API for the boxes
core.allowNewBox - Allow new boxes to be added, if they try to connect
core.flex_enabled - When enabled this UID always gets assigned the audio selected from web interface
core.flex_uid - UID which shall get selected audio files assigned
core.tonies_json_auto_update - Auto-Update tonies.json for Tonies information and images.
security_mit.warnAccess - If teddyCloud detects unusal access, warn on frontend until restart. (See on*)
security_mit.lockAccess - If teddyCloud detects a unusal access, lock frontend until restart. (See on*)
security_mit.httpsOnly - Lock/Warn on HTTPS port only.
security_mit.onBlacklistDomain - Lock/Warn, if domain is known to be public.
security_mit.onCrawler - Lock/Warn, if crawler is detected (User-Agent).
security_mit.onRobotsTxt - Lock/Warn, if robots.txt is accessed.
cloud.remote_hostname - Hostname of remote cloud server
cloud.remote_port - Port of remote cloud server
cloud.enableV1Claim - Forward 'claim' queries to claim tonies in the household in the tonies cloud
cloud.enableV1CloudReset - Forward 'cloudReset' queries to tonies cloud
cloud.enableV1FreshnessCheck - Forward 'freshnessCheck' queries to mark new content as updated to tonies cloud
cloud.enableV1Log - Forward 'log' queries to tonies cloud
cloud.enableV1Time - Forward 'time' queries to tonies cloud
cloud.enableV1Ota - Forward 'ota' queries to tonies cloud
cloud.enableV2Content - Forward 'content' queries to download content from the tonies cloud
cloud.cacheOta - Cache OTA files in firmware dir of local server (this still blocks OTA if local OTA delivery is disabled)
cloud.localOta - Send local OTA files in firmware dir
cloud.cacheContent - Cache cloud content on local server
cloud.cacheToLibrary - Cache cloud content to library
cloud.markCustomTagByPass - Automatically mark custom tags by password
cloud.prioCustomContent - Prioritize custom content over tonies content (force update, only if "Update content on lower audio id" is disabled)
cloud.updateOnLowerAudioId - Update content on a lower audio id
cloud.dumpRuidAuthContentJson - Dump the rUID and authentication into the content JSON.
encode.bitrate - Opus bitrate, tested 64, 96(default), 128, 192, 256 - be aware that this increases the TAF size!
encode.ffmpeg_stream_buffer_ms - Stream buffer for ffmpeg based streaming.

encode.ffmpeg_stream_restart - If a stream is continued by the box, a new file is forced. This has the cost of a slower restart, but does not play the old buffered content and deletes the previous stream data on the box.
encode.ffmpeg_sweep_startup_buffer - Webradio streams often send several seconds as a buffer immediately. This may contain ads and will add up if you disalbe 'Stream force restart'.
encode.ffmpeg_sweep_delay_ms - Wait x ms until sweeping is stopped and stream is started. Delays stream start, but may increase success.
frontend.split_model_content - If enabled, the content of the TAF will be shown beside the model of the figurine
frontend.ignore_web_version_mismatch - Ignore web version mismatch and don't show the mismatch warning
frontend.confirm_audioplayer_close - Confirm dialog when closing the audioplayer during active playback
toniebox.api_access - Grant access to the API (default value for new boxes)
toniebox.overrideCloud - Override tonies cloud settings for the toniebox with those set here
toniebox.slap_enabled - Enable track skip via slapping gesture
toniebox.slap_back_left - Determine slap direction for skipping track: False for left-backward, True for left-forward
rtnl.logRaw - Enable logging for raw RTNL data
rtnl.logHuman - Enable logging for human-readable RTNL data
rtnl.logRawFile - Specify the filepath for raw RTNL log
rtnl.logHumanFile - Specify the filepath for human-readable RTNL log
pcap.enabled - Enable logging for HTTP(S) traffic into a .pcap file (needs restart)
pcap.filename - Specify the filepath for libpcap log
mqtt.hostname - IP or Hostname of the MQTT server
hass.id - Unique ID to identify this device
tonie_json.cache_preload - Download all figurine images on startup. This will take several minutes the first time you start TeddyCloud.

toniebox.slap_back_left - Determine slap direction for skipping track: False for left-backward, True for left-forward
rtnl.logRaw - Enable logging for raw RTNL data
rtnl.logHuman - Enable logging for human-readable RTNL data
rtnl.logRawFile - Specify the filepath for raw RTNL log
rtnl.logHumanFile - Specify the filepath for human-readable RTNL log
pcap.enabled - Enable logging for HTTP(S) traffic into a .pcap file (needs restart)
pcap.filename - Specify the filepath for libpcap log
mqtt.hostname - IP or Hostname of the MQTT server
hass.id - Unique ID to identify this device
tonie_json.cache_preload - Download all figurine images on startup. This will take several minutes the first time you start TeddyCloud.
debug.web.pcm_encode_console_url - Caches the PCM of the browser-side encoding and prints a download link to the browser console.
teddycloud log.logFullAuth - Log full authentication of tags
teddycloud core.server.http_port - HTTP port for the webinterface
teddycloud core.server.https_web_port - HTTPS port for the webinterface
teddycloud core.server.https_api_port - HTTPS port for the Toniebox API
teddycloud core.server.bind_ip - ip for binding the http ports to
teddycloud core.host_url - URL to teddyCloud server
teddycloud core.certdir - Directory to upload genuine client certificates
teddycloud core.librarydir - Directory of the audio library
teddycloud core.datadir - Base directory for 'contentdir', 'firmwaredir', 'cachedir' and 'wwwdir' when they are relative
teddycloud core.cachedir - Directory where to cache files downloaded from internet
teddycloud core.sslkeylogfile - SSL/TLS key log filename
teddycloud core.new_webgui_as_default - Use new WebGUI as default
teddycloud core.server_cert.file.ca_der - CA certificate as DER
teddycloud core.boxCertAuth - Client certificates are required for access to the HTTPS API for the boxes
teddycloud core.allowNewBox - Allow new boxes to be added, if they try to connect
teddycloud core.flex_enabled - When enabled this UID always gets assigned the audio selected from web interface
teddycloud core.flex_uid - UID which shall get selected audio files assigned
teddycloud core.tonies_json_auto_update - Auto-Update tonies.json for Tonies information and images.
teddycloud security_mit.warnAccess - If teddyCloud detects unusal access, warn on frontend until restart. (See on*)
teddycloud security_mit.lockAccess - If teddyCloud detects a unusal access, lock frontend until restart. (See on*)
teddycloud security_mit.httpsOnly - Lock/Warn on HTTPS port only.
teddycloud security_mit.onBlacklistDomain - Lock/Warn, if domain is known to be public.
teddycloud security_mit.onCrawler - Lock/Warn, if crawler is detected (User-Agent).
teddycloud security_mit.onRobotsTxt - Lock/Warn, if robots.txt is accessed.
teddycloud cloud.enabled - Generally enable cloud operation
teddycloud cloud.remote_hostname - Hostname of remote cloud server
teddycloud cloud.remote_port - Port of remote cloud server
teddycloud cloud.enableV1Claim - Forward 'claim' queries to claim tonies in the household in the tonies cloud
teddycloud cloud.enableV1CloudReset - Forward 'cloudReset' queries to tonies cloud
teddycloud cloud.enableV1FreshnessCheck - Forward 'freshnessCheck' queries to mark new content as updated to tonies cloud
teddycloud cloud.enableV1Log - Forward 'log' queries to tonies cloud
teddycloud cloud.enableV1Time - Forward 'time' queries to tonies cloud
teddycloud cloud.enableV1Ota - Forward 'ota' queries to tonies cloud
teddycloud cloud.enableV2Content - Forward 'content' queries to download content from the tonies cloud
teddycloud cloud.cacheOta - Cache OTA files in firmware dir of local server (this still blocks OTA if local OTA delivery is disabled)
teddycloud cloud.localOta - Send local OTA files in firmware dir
teddycloud cloud.cacheContent - Cache cloud content on local server
teddycloud cloud.cacheToLibrary - Cache cloud content to library
teddycloud cloud.markCustomTagByPass - Automatically mark custom tags by password
teddycloud cloud.prioCustomContent - Prioritize custom content over tonies content (force update, only if "Update content on lower audio id" is disabled)
teddycloud cloud.updateOnLowerAudioId - Update content on a lower audio id
teddycloud cloud.dumpRuidAuthContentJson - Dump the rUID and authentication into the content JSON.
teddycloud encode.bitrate - Opus bitrate, tested 64, 96(default), 128, 192, 256 - be aware that this increases the TAF size!
teddycloud encode.ffmpeg_stream_buffer_ms - Stream buffer for ffmpeg based streaming.

teddycloud encode.ffmpeg_stream_restart - If a stream is continued by the box, a new file is forced. This has the cost of a slower restart, but does not play the old buffered content and deletes the previous stream data on the box.
teddycloud encode.ffmpeg_sweep_startup_buffer - Webradio streams often send several seconds as a buffer immediately. This may contain ads and will add up if you disalbe 'Stream force restart'.
teddycloud encode.ffmpeg_sweep_delay_ms - Wait x ms until sweeping is stopped and stream is started. Delays stream start, but may increase success.
teddycloud frontend.split_model_content - If enabled, the content of the TAF will be shown beside the model of the figurine
teddycloud frontend.ignore_web_version_mismatch - Ignore web version mismatch and don't show the mismatch warning
teddycloud frontend.confirm_audioplayer_close - Confirm dialog when closing the audioplayer during active playback
teddycloud toniebox.api_access - Grant access to the API (default value for new boxes)
teddycloud toniebox.overrideCloud - Override tonies cloud settings for the toniebox with those set here
teddycloud toniebox.slap_enabled - Enable track skip via slapping gesture
teddycloud toniebox.slap_back_left - Determine slap direction for skipping track: False for left-backward, True for left-forward
teddycloud rtnl.logRaw - Enable logging for raw RTNL data
teddycloud rtnl.logHuman - Enable logging for human-readable RTNL data
teddycloud rtnl.logRawFile - Specify the filepath for raw RTNL log
teddycloud rtnl.logHumanFile - Specify the filepath for human-readable RTNL log
teddycloud pcap.enabled - Enable logging for HTTP(S) traffic into a .pcap file (needs restart)
teddycloud pcap.filename - Specify the filepath for libpcap log
teddycloud mqtt.hostname - IP or Hostname of the MQTT server
teddycloud mqtt.port - Port of MQTT server
teddycloud hass.id - Unique ID to identify this device
teddycloud tonie_json.cache_images - Cache figurine images locally
teddycloud tonie_json.cache_preload - Download all figurine images on startup. This will take several minutes the first time you start TeddyCloud.
teddycloud debug.web.pcm_encode_console_url - Caches the PCM of the browser-side encoding and prints a download link to the browser console.
teddycloud core.full_taf_validation - Validate TAFs by checking the audio length and the SHA1 hash. (may be slow, as file needs to be fully read!)
teddycloud core.tap_taf_validation - Validate TAFs of TAPs by checking the audio length and the SHA1 hash. (may be slow, as file needs to be fully read!)
teddycloud core.track_pos_taf_validation - Validate TAFs when track position error occurs by checking the audio length and the SHA1 hash. (may be slow, as file needs to be fully read!)
teddycloud security_mit.hardLock - Disable teddyCloud due to ignored security warnings.
teddycloud toniebox.field2 - Unknown Toniebox setting, default 7
teddycloud toniebox.field6 - Unknown Toniebox setting, default 1
teddycloud mqtt.retain_will - Retain last will message
teddycloud mqtt.disable_on_error - Disable MQTT if there were to many errors
